items.text:
Hi Priya,

My office hours change this week only. Instead of Monday, I'll be in Room 312 on Thursday, May 14, from 2:00 to 4:00 PM. If you join the new study group, there's a $5 materials fee. Please email me to confirm.

Best,
Dr. Holt

questions.stem: According to the email, when will Dr. Holt hold office hours this week?
questions.explanation: The email states office hours move to Thursday, May 14, from 2:00 to 4:00 PM, which is the afternoon.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who wants to join the study group?

options.D: They will need to pay something

questions.explanation: Because joining the study group carries a $5 materials fee, a student wishing to join will need to pay something.

items.text: Heads up, everyone! The Rolling Bites truck is back by the Quad fountain today until 3:00 PM. They've got a $3 taco special and the line moves fast. Honestly the best lunch deal on campus this week. Grab one before they sell out!

questions.stem: According to the post, where is the food truck located today?
questions.explanation: The post says the Rolling Bites truck is back by the Quad fountain today.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who arrive after 3:00 PM?

options.A: They will pay a higher price
options.D: They will wait in a long line

questions.explanation: Since the truck is only there until 3:00 PM, students arriving later may miss it entirely.

items.text:
Dear Tomas,

Your parking permit is ready for pickup at the Transportation Office in Carver Hall, Room 105. Please collect it by Friday, June 5, before 5:00 PM, and bring your vehicle registration. You can't park on campus until the permit is displayed.

Regards,
Lena Ortiz

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Tomas bring when picking up the permit?
questions.explanation: The email instructs Tomas to bring his vehicle registration when collecting the permit.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about parking on campus before the permit is displayed?
questions.explanation: Because Tomas cannot park on campus until the permit is displayed, parking is not yet allowed beforehand.

items.text: Okay, you have to try the new lavender latte at the Birch Street Café! It's only $4.50 and they're serving it through Sunday, May 17. So smooth and not too sweet. Best thing I've ordered there all semester. Go before the special ends!

questions.stem: According to the post, what does the writer say about the new drink?
questions.explanation: The writer describes the latte as so smooth and not too sweet, meaning it tastes smooth and mild.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about ordering the drink after May 17?

options.A: It may no longer be offered
options.B: It may cost a higher price
options.D: It may come in a new flavor

questions.explanation: Since the drink is served only through Sunday, May 17, it may no longer be available after that date.
